preferred_translation: one discerns: there is no more of this state of being
alternative_translations: one clearly knows: there is no more of this state of being
one understands: there is no more of this state of being
definition: Arahant-declaration formula surface using pajānāti on the release side; governed here so the verb does not drift into vague realization rhetoric.
notes: This formula inherits the pajānāti policy while sitting in liberation-side prose. MN 36 supports the formula surface directly. Keep the line plain and decisive. Do not inflate it into imported enlightenment-talk or soften it into bland understanding if the sharper verbal force can still be heard.

example_phrases.translation: one discerns: there is no more of this state of being

authority_basis.scope: Supports the release-side pajānāti formula in arahant declarations.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use 'one discerns: there is no more of this state of being' as the default rendering when this formula is translated directly.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Use the controlled alternates only when the immediate English context requires it. Do not inflate the formula into generic realization or enlightenment rhetoric.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents pajānāti in liberation formulas from drifting into vague realization-language or imported attainment slogans.
